title: Data Model - Encounter
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-031' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-031' to ingest requirements
Create/Update Test File for DATA-004 database models
Create SQLAlchemy models in `backend/app/models.py` based on DATA-004
Generate and run Alembic migrations for the new models
Run Pytest to verify database operations and constraints
definition_of_done: SQLAlchemy models created and matching the specification
Alembic migrations generated and successfully applied
Tests pass for model creation and constraints
All modified source files have @trace annotation
